message:
feat(cli): auto-import stale JSONL on storage open for all commands

Add open_storage_ctx_with_auto_import() helper that wraps storage open +
auto_import_storage_ctx_if_stale into a single call. Previously only the
main bootstrap path ran stale-JSONL auto-import; commands with their own
storage-open paths (list, search, stats, etc.) could show stale data.

Switch 18 command files from config::open_storage_with_cli to the new
helper: blocked, changelog, count, create, defer, delete, dep, epic,
label, lint, list, q, query, ready, search, stale, stats.

New test: open_storage_with_auto_import_imports_newer_jsonl_state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
